title: elymus dentatus subsp. lachnophyllus
intro: Elymus dentatus subsp. lachnophyllus, also known as Chinese wheat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and boost the immune system. The health benefits of Elymus dentatus subsp. lachnophyllus include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the body's natural detoxification processes. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically consumed as a juice or tea, and it may also be used as an ingredient in dietary supplements to promote overall health and well-being.
